structured.name: Set Variable Monitoring
structured.objective:
To give the CSMS the ability to request the Charging Station to set monitoring triggers on
Variables.
structured.description:
This use case describes how the CSMS requests the Charging Station to set monitoring triggers
on Variables. Multiple triggers can be set for upper or lower thresholds, delta changes or periodic
reporting.
scenario: 1. The CSO triggers the CSMS to request a Charging Station to set a variable monitoring setting.
2. The CSMS sends a SetVariableMonitoringRequest to the Charging Station.
3. The Charging Station responds with a SetVariableMonitoringResponse.
structured.prerequisites:
Charging Station supports Monitoring
The specific Variable supports Monitoring
structured.postconditions: The Charging Station activated the set of monitoring triggers on the Variables.
structured.remarks:
All variableMonitoring settings are persistent across reboot.
A variableMonitoring setting is persistent after a firmware update, if the monitored variable still
exists and it is still monitor-able. Otherwise the variableMonitoring setting is removed.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with an
X number of SetMonitoringData
elements
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL respond with an
SetVariableMonitoringResponse with an equal (X)
number of SetMonitoringResult elements, one for
every SetMonitoringData element in the
SetVariableMonitoringRequest.

Every SetMonitoringResult element in the
SetVariableMonitoringResponse SHALL contain the
same component and variable combination as one
of the SetVariableMonitoringRequest elements in
the SetVariableMonitoringRequest.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with an
unknown Component in
SetMonitoringData
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL set the attributeStatus
field in the corresponding SetMonitoringResult to:
UnknownComponent.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with a
Variable that is unknown for the given
Component in SetMonitoringData
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL set the attributeStatus
field in the corresponding SetMonitoringResult to:
UnknownVariable.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with an
MonitorType which is not supported
by the specific Variable
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL set the attributeStatus
field in the corresponding SetMonitoringResult to:
UnsupportedMonitorType.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with
( monitor type = UpperThreshold
AND
value < minLimit OR
value > maxLimit ) OR
( monitor type = LowerThreshold
AND
value < minLimit OR
value > maxLimit )
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL set the attributeStatus
field in the corresponding SetMonitoringResult to:
Rejected.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest for a
monitor that conflicts with safety
requirements.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station MAY set the attributeStatus
field in the corresponding SetMonitoringResult to: <
Rejected.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station was able
to set the given value in the
SetMonitoringData
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL set the attributeStatus
field in the corresponding SetMonitoringResult to:
Accepted.

The maximum size and number of items of
monitoringData in one
SetVariableMonitoringRequest message is
determined by the
ItemsPerMessageSetVariableMonitoring
and
BytesPerMessageSetVariableMonitoring
Configuration Variables.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest for a
component/variable combination for
which a monitor with the same type
and severity already exists with a
different id.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL set the attributeStatus
field in the corresponding SetMonitoringResult to:
Duplicate.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest without
an Id AND
N04.FR.08
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station will generate an Id and return
it in the SetVariableMonitoringResponse.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with an
Id AND
A monitor exists matching the given Id
AND
The given Component/Variable
combination corresponds with the
existing VariableMonitor.
requirements.definition: The Charging Station SHALL replace the monitor.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with an
Id AND
No monitor exists matching the given
Id.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL set the attributeStatus
field in the corresponding SetMonitoringResult to:
Rejected.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with
type Delta and value contains a
negative value.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL set the attributeStatus
field in the corresponding SetMonitoringResult to:
Rejected.

requirements.precondition:
N04.FR.12 AND
The replaced VariableMonitor
belonged to the
'PreconfiguredMonitors'.
requirements.definition:
The new VariableMonitor shall be classified as a
'CustomMonitor', until reset by a
SetMonitoringBaseRequest.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with an
Id AND
a monitor exists matching the given Id
AND
the given Component/Variable
combination does NOT correspond
with the existing VariableMonitor.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL respond with
Rejected AND NOT replace the VariableMonitor.

requirements.precondition:
When the CSMS sends a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with
type Delta for a Variable that is NOT of
a numeric type
requirements.definition: It is RECOMMENDED to use a value of 1.

requirements.precondition:
N04.FR.12 AND
The id in the
SetVariableMonitoringRequest refers
to a HardWiredMonitor
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL respond with
Rejected AND NOT replace the VariableMonitor.

The CSMS IS RECOMMENDED to send a
GetMonitoringReportRequest message to get a new
list of monitors.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with
type Delta and the value is zero.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHOULD set the
attributeStatus field in the corresponding
SetMonitoringResult to: Rejected.

chunks.content:
# N04 - Set Variable Monitoring

**Objective:** To give the CSMS the ability to request the Charging Station to set monitoring triggers on
Variables.

**Description:** This use case describes how the CSMS requests the Charging Station to set monitoring triggers
on Variables. Multiple triggers can be set for upper or lower thresholds, delta changes or periodic
reporting.

**Actors:** Charging Station, CSMS, CSO

**Scenario:**
1. The CSO triggers the CSMS to request a Charging Station to set a variable monitoring setting.
2. The CSMS sends a SetVariableMonitoringRequest to the Charging Station.
3. The Charging Station responds with a SetVariableMonitoringResponse.

**Prerequisites:** Charging Station supports Monitoring
The specific Variable supports Monitoring

**Postconditions:** The Charging Station activated the set of monitoring triggers on the Variables.

**Remarks:** All variableMonitoring settings are persistent across reboot.
A variableMonitoring setting is persistent after a firmware update, if the monitored variable still
exists and it is still monitor-able. Otherwise the variableMonitoring setting is removed.

# N04 - Requirements

**N04.FR.01**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with an
X number of SetMonitoringData
elements
The Charging Station SHALL respond with an
SetVariableMonitoringResponse with an equal (X)
number of SetMonitoringResult elements, one for
every SetMonitoringData element in the
SetVariableMonitoringRequest.

**N04.FR.02**
Precondition: N04.FR.01
Every SetMonitoringResult element in the
SetVariableMonitoringResponse SHALL contain the
same component and variable combination as one
of the SetVariableMonitoringRequest elements in
the SetVariableMonitoringRequest.

**N04.FR.03**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with an
unknown Component in
SetMonitoringData
The Charging Station SHALL set the attributeStatus
field in the corresponding SetMonitoringResult to:
UnknownComponent.

**N04.FR.04**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with a
Variable that is unknown for the given
Component in SetMonitoringData
The Charging Station SHALL set the attributeStatus
field in the corresponding SetMonitoringResult to:
UnknownVariable.

**N04.FR.05**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with an
MonitorType which is not supported
by the specific Variable
The Charging Station SHALL set the attributeStatus
field in the corresponding SetMonitoringResult to:
UnsupportedMonitorType.

**N04.FR.06**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with
( monitor type = UpperThreshold
AND
value < minLimit OR
value > maxLimit ) OR
( monitor type = LowerThreshold
AND
value < minLimit OR
value > maxLimit )
The Charging Station SHALL set the attributeStatus
field in the corresponding SetMonitoringResult to:
Rejected.

**N04.FR.07**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest for a
monitor that conflicts with safety
requirements.
The Charging Station MAY set the attributeStatus
field in the corresponding SetMonitoringResult to: <
Rejected.

**N04.FR.08**
Precondition: When the Charging Station was able
to set the given value in the
SetMonitoringData
The Charging Station SHALL set the attributeStatus
field in the corresponding SetMonitoringResult to:
Accepted.

# N04 - Requirements (continued)

**N04.FR.09**
The maximum size and number of items of
monitoringData in one
SetVariableMonitoringRequest message is
determined by the
ItemsPerMessageSetVariableMonitoring
and
BytesPerMessageSetVariableMonitoring
Configuration Variables.

**N04.FR.10**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest for a
component/variable combination for
which a monitor with the same type
and severity already exists with a
different id.
The Charging Station SHALL set the attributeStatus
field in the corresponding SetMonitoringResult to:
Duplicate.

**N04.FR.11**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest without
an Id AND
N04.FR.08
The Charging Station will generate an Id and return
it in the SetVariableMonitoringResponse.

**N04.FR.12**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with an
Id AND
A monitor exists matching the given Id
AND
The given Component/Variable
combination corresponds with the
existing VariableMonitor.
The Charging Station SHALL replace the monitor.

**N04.FR.13**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with an
Id AND
No monitor exists matching the given
Id.
The Charging Station SHALL set the attributeStatus
field in the corresponding SetMonitoringResult to:
Rejected.

**N04.FR.14**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with
type Delta and value contains a
negative value.
The Charging Station SHALL set the attributeStatus
field in the corresponding SetMonitoringResult to:
Rejected.

**N04.FR.15**
Precondition: N04.FR.12 AND
The replaced VariableMonitor
belonged to the
'PreconfiguredMonitors'.
The new VariableMonitor shall be classified as a
'CustomMonitor', until reset by a
SetMonitoringBaseRequest.

**N04.FR.16**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with an
Id AND
a monitor exists matching the given Id
AND
the given Component/Variable
combination does NOT correspond
with the existing VariableMonitor.
The Charging Station SHALL respond with
Rejected AND NOT replace the VariableMonitor.

**N04.FR.17**
Precondition: When the CSMS sends a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with
type Delta for a Variable that is NOT of
a numeric type
It is RECOMMENDED to use a value of 1.

# N04 - Requirements (continued)

**N04.FR.18**
Precondition: N04.FR.12 AND
The id in the
SetVariableMonitoringRequest refers
to a HardWiredMonitor
The Charging Station SHALL respond with
Rejected AND NOT replace the VariableMonitor.

**N04.FR.19**
Precondition: The Charging Station has rebooted
The CSMS IS RECOMMENDED to send a
GetMonitoringReportRequest message to get a new
list of monitors.

**N04.FR.20**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetVariableMonitoringRequest with
type Delta and the value is zero.
The Charging Station SHOULD set the
attributeStatus field in the corresponding
SetMonitoringResult to: Rejected.
